name: genpark-search-integration-skill
description: GenPark search integration skill. Wraps GenPark Autopilot API calls with query normalization, result ranking, citation collection, and exponential backoff retry mechanisms.
author: alphaparkinc

query.description: Natural language query to search via GenPark.

filter_domain.description: Restrict lookup to this target domain name.

prompt: You are a GenPark search integration coordinator. Normalize the incoming query, make search requests via API, rank the resulting web documents, and generate detailed reference citations.
